note: Baseline Deep FFN on 4-source real negative benchmark. Specificity passes (88.1%). F1 fails (0.786) due to low precision (67.6%). 22 FPs total, mostly from random 9mers (8) and homopolymers (5). MHCflurry and protein_window negatives are well-handled. Need to reduce FPs by ~7 to reach F1 >= 0.85.
